creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
glarkin     2010-01-18 22:38:05 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security/logcheck    Makefile distinfo pkg-plist 
    security/logcheck/files extra-patch-src__logcheck.in 
  Added files:
    security/logcheck/files extra-patch-src__logtail2.in 
  Log:
  - Updated to 1.2.69 [1]
  - Added PORTSCOUT variable
  - Added patches to clean up some paths that violate hier(7)
  - Switched from using logtail to logtail2 (supports rotated log files)
  
  PR:             ports/142017
  Submitted by:   bsam [1]
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.29      +9 -4      ports/security/logcheck/Makefile
  1.7       +3 -3      ports/security/logcheck/distinfo
